creator_message: Could you share more details regarding the project concept, storyline, usage rights, platforms, AI likeness usage, and compensation?
business_context: Creator asks for full project overview before deciding.
best_reply: Hi! Thank you so much for your interest in our AI Short Drama project. This is not a traditional sponsored-post collaboration. It is a project-based AI Short Drama where we co-create an original AI-generated mini-series with you as the main character. A complete project usually includes 10–20 episodes. Around the first one-third of the series is released for free to attract viewers, while the remaining episodes are unlocked on our platform through a one-time purchase. During the launch period, creators typically publish around five promotional posts, including free episodes, trailers, highlight clips, or other mutually agreed promotional content. Your image and likeness will only be used for this specific AI short drama and its related promotion and distribution, not for unrelated commercial projects or AI model training. We currently offer two collaboration models: Fixed Project Fee and Revenue Share, where creators receive 80% of the Net Revenue generated by the project.
chinese_translation: 介绍项目不是传统广告，而是以创作者为主角的 AI 短剧；说明集数、免费剧集、社媒发布、肖像使用范围、两种合作模式。
why_this_reply: 初次接触时对方需要完整理解项目，回复应完整但不要太法律化。
next_step: 询问对方更倾向固定付费还是收益分成；可发送平台链接或样片。
risk_notes: 不要承诺具体剧情或具体收益。

creator_message: Could you send more details from the brief? We would like to consider a fixed fee.
business_context: User can only offer USD 400 fixed fee.
best_reply: Hi! Thank you so much for your interest. For the Fixed Project Fee model, the highest budget we can currently offer is USD 400 for the entire project. Just to clarify, this is not a traditional sponsored post or a per-video collaboration. It is a complete AI Short Drama project, usually consisting of 10–20 episodes, with around five promotional posts during the launch period, such as free episodes, trailers, highlight clips, or other agreed promotional content. That said, I would honestly recommend considering our Revenue Share model instead. Under this model, creators receive 80% of the Net Revenue generated by the project, and for creators with an engaged audience, the long-term earning potential can be significantly higher than a one-time fixed payment.
chinese_translation: 固费最高400美元，是整个项目不是单条视频；项目包含10–20集和约5条宣传；重点推荐80%收益分成。
why_this_reply: 固费较低时必须解释项目制，同时转向分成模式。
next_step: 如果对方接受固费，发固定费合同；如果有兴趣，发分成合同。
risk_notes: 避免说预算太低是因为账号差。

creator_message: Perfecto, este proyecto parece bastante interesante. ¿Cuál es el siguiente paso?
business_context: Creator is interested. User can offer USD 200 fixed fee but wants to recommend Revenue Share.
best_reply: ¡Hola! 😊 Me alegra mucho saber que te interesa el proyecto. El siguiente paso sería decidir qué modelo de colaboración prefieres. Actualmente ofrecemos dos opciones. La primera es Pago Fijo. Para tu perfil, el presupuesto máximo que podemos ofrecer es de USD 200 para todo el proyecto. Se trata de una colaboración por proyecto, no de una campaña publicitaria tradicional. Una serie completa suele tener entre 10 y 20 episodios, y durante el lanzamiento el creador normalmente publica alrededor de 5 contenidos promocionales, como episodios gratuitos, tráilers, escenas destacadas u otros materiales acordados. La segunda opción es Revenue Share, que personalmente creo que se adapta mucho mejor a tu perfil. Con este modelo, los creadores reciben el 80% del Net Revenue generado por la serie. En lugar de recibir un único pago fijo, puedes seguir obteniendo ingresos mientras la serie continúe generando ventas. Además, nosotros también nos encargaremos de la distribución y promoción global del proyecto.
chinese_translation: 西语：确认下一步是选择合作模式；固费200美元作为项目费用；重点推荐80%收益分成和平台全球推广。
why_this_reply: 达人已高意向，应推进合作模式选择，不要重新长篇科普。
next_step: 询问选择固定费还是分成；如选择分成，发合同草案。
risk_notes: 固费低但可直接说，因为用户授权；仍需重点推分成。

creator_message: Puedo ajustar mi propuesta a USD 1,000 como tarifa fija para este primer proyecto.
business_context: User says actual fixed fee is extremely low and should not be stated. Say fixed fee cannot reach several hundred dollars. Compliment visual fit.
best_reply: Hola, muchas gracias por tu respuesta y por tu disposición para encontrar un punto intermedio. También apreciamos mucho tu interés en colaborar con nosotros. Después de revisar nuevamente tu perfil con nuestro equipo, lamentablemente nuestro presupuesto para el modelo de Fixed Fee no puede llegar a una cifra de varios cientos de dólares para este proyecto. Nuestro presupuesto de tarifa fija se determina mediante una evaluación interna que considera principalmente el rendimiento reciente de la cuenta, como el alcance, las visualizaciones y la interacción de las publicaciones recientes. Aunque creemos que tu imagen y tu estilo encajan muy bien con el concepto de una AI Short Drama, el rendimiento reciente del contenido también es un factor muy importante dentro de nuestro sistema de evaluación. Por ese motivo, sinceramente creemos que el modelo de Revenue Share sería una opción mucho más adecuada para ti. En este modelo, los creadores reciben el 80% del Net Revenue generado por la serie. A diferencia de una tarifa fija, tus ingresos no están limitados a un único pago, sino que pueden seguir creciendo a medida que la serie genere ventas.
chinese_translation: 固定费无法达到数百美元；用近期账号表现解释，不直接说具体极低数字；夸形象适合并推收益分成。
why_this_reply: 保护达人感受，避免因低报价伤害关系。
next_step: 发送分成合同草案。
risk_notes: 不要写出真实极低预算。

creator_message: Here are our standard rates: 1x TikTok $4,000, 1x IG Reel $4,000, UGC $2,000. Could you let us know the best possible rate?
business_context: User can only offer USD 500 fixed fee. Need explain project and push Revenue Share.
best_reply: Hi, thank you so much for your reply and for sharing your rate card. We really appreciate it. After discussing internally with our team, the highest Fixed Project Fee we can currently offer is USD 500 for the entire project. Just to clarify, this isn't a traditional sponsored-post collaboration. It's a project-based AI Short Drama, where you become the main character of an original AI-generated mini-series created around your personal brand and content style. A complete project typically includes an AI short drama consisting of approximately 10–20 episodes, around the first one-third released for free to attract viewers, approximately 5 promotional posts on your social media, and global distribution and promotion by our platform. I completely understand that USD 500 is significantly lower than your standard rates. Our fixed-fee budget is determined through a standardized internal evaluation process and unfortunately we aren't able to increase it further. However, after reviewing your profile, I genuinely believe that our Revenue Share model would be a much better fit. Under this model, creators receive 80% of the Net Revenue generated by their AI short drama.
chinese_translation: 对方报价高，固费最高500美元；解释项目不是传统广告，而是完整 AI 短剧；强调平台推广并推荐80%收益分成。
why_this_reply: 经纪人/商务团队看重报价卡，要先认可再解释预算和项目差异。
next_step: 问是否愿意查看分成合同。
risk_notes: 不要直接说对方报价不值。

creator_message: Would USD 6,000 work for your team?
business_context: User says max fixed fee is USD 4,000. Most recent creators choose Revenue Share.
best_reply: Hi! Thank you so much for your reply and for sharing your thoughts. After discussing this with our team, the highest Fixed Project Fee we can offer is USD 4,000 for the entire project. Our fixed-fee pricing is based on a standardized internal evaluation, taking into account factors such as your recent video performance, audience engagement, and overall account influence. In fact, it's quite rare for us to offer a fixed fee as high as USD 4,000, which also reflects that we believe your profile performs very well and has strong potential. Unfortunately, USD 6,000 is beyond the budget we can approve for the Fixed Fee model. That said, I would honestly recommend considering our Revenue Share model instead. In fact, almost all of the creators we've recently partnered with have chosen this model because of its much greater long-term earning potential. Under the Revenue Share model, creators receive 80% of the Net Revenue.
chinese_translation: 固费最高4000美元，6000美元超预算；解释4000已经是少数较高报价，说明账号表现不错；重点推收益分成。
why_this_reply: 保留达人面子，把拒绝变成认可账号表现。
next_step: 若对分成感兴趣，发送合同草案。
risk_notes: 不要让对方觉得被压价；强调评估体系。

creator_message: Given my audience size and likeness value, would you be open to discussing a higher fixed fee?
business_context: User can offer max USD 6,500 fixed fee. Push Revenue Share; mention potential USD 200,000 gross revenue before deductions, no calculation details.
best_reply: Hi, thank you so much for your message. I really appreciate your interest in the project, and I completely understand your perspective. After discussing it with our team, USD 6,500 is the highest fixed project fee we can offer for this collaboration. I'll also send you the Fixed Fee agreement draft for your review, along with the payment schedule. Under the fixed-fee model, the payment is made in two installments: the first installment is paid within 10 business days after the project officially enters production, and the second installment is paid after the project has been completed and officially released. That said, after reviewing your profile, I still genuinely believe that the Revenue Share model would be a much better fit for you. Under this model, creators receive 80% of the Net Revenue generated by the project. Based on your audience size and engagement, we estimate that a successful project could potentially generate around USD 200,000 in total revenue before any applicable deductions. This is why I sincerely believe the Revenue Share model offers significantly greater earning potential than a one-time fixed payment. Of course, every project is different, and the final performance depends on factors such as the story itself, audience engagement, and the overall promotional performance.
chinese_translation: 固费最高6500美元；说明固定付费两次付款；推荐收益分成，并用20万美元潜在总收入作为非保证性估算。
why_this_reply: 大V需要给足专业解释和上限，同时强推分成。
next_step: 发送固定费合同或分成合同。
risk_notes: 不要展示计算过程；必须说不是保证收益。

creator_message: Gostaríamos de negociar um formato combinado: um valor fixo inicial somado a uma participação nos ganhos enquanto a série estiver no ar.
business_context: Hybrid not supported. User can offer USD 3,000 fixed fee and push Revenue Share.
best_reply: Olá, muito obrigado pela sua resposta e por compartilhar suas ideias conosco. Ficamos muito felizes em saber que vocês têm interesse em seguir com o projeto. Em relação ao modelo híbrido (valor fixo + Revenue Share), entendemos perfeitamente a proposta. No entanto, no momento, infelizmente esse não é um modelo que conseguimos oferecer, pois nosso projeto segue um formato padronizado de colaboração. Atualmente, oferecemos apenas duas modalidades de parceria: Pagamento Fixo ou Revenue Share. Para o perfil de vocês, podemos oferecer um pagamento fixo de USD 3.000 para todo o projeto. Vale destacar que esse valor corresponde ao projeto completo, e não a uma publicação individual. Durante o lançamento, normalmente o criador publica cerca de 5 conteúdos relacionados ao projeto, que podem incluir episódios gratuitos da série, trailers, cenas de destaque, bastidores ou outros materiais promocionais acordados. Sinceramente, acreditamos que o modelo de Revenue Share seja a melhor opção. Nesse formato, o criador recebe 80% da receita líquida gerada pelo projeto, e acreditamos que o potencial de retorno pode ser superior ao pagamento fixo.
chinese_translation: 葡语：拒绝混合模式，说明目前只能固定付费或收益分成；固费3000美元；解释约5条内容；推荐80%分成。
why_this_reply: 葡语达人/经纪人常问混合结构，需要明确但温和拒绝。
next_step: 让对方选择固定费或分成。
risk_notes: 不要承诺后续一定可混合。

creator_message: Con gusto podemos continuar la comunicación por WhatsApp. Mi número es...
business_context: User has already sent updated contract by email. WhatsApp temporarily unreliable; say email is safer indirectly.
best_reply: Hola, muchas gracias por tu mensaje y por compartir tus comentarios. Me alegra mucho saber que el proyecto te entusiasma. Te acabo de enviar la versión actualizada del contrato por correo electrónico, así que cuando tengas un momento, por favor revísala. Por el momento, parece que estamos teniendo algunos inconvenientes para recibir correctamente algunos mensajes por WhatsApp, así que, para evitar cualquier retraso o pérdida de información, ¿podríamos continuar la comunicación por correo electrónico por ahora? Después de revisar el contrato, si tienes cualquier duda, comentario o sugerencia, no dudes en responder directamente al correo. Estaré encantada de revisarlo contigo y aclarar cualquier punto.
chinese_translation: 西语：合同已发邮箱；WhatsApp 可能有消息接收问题，为避免遗漏，先用邮件沟通；看完合同后可直接邮件回复疑问。
why_this_reply: 不直接说账号出问题，但把沟通引导回邮箱。
next_step: 等待对方邮件反馈合同。
risk_notes: 不要说 WhatsApp 账号有明显故障或不能用。

creator_message: Creator sent several messages but user did not receive them due to network issue.
business_context: Need ask creator to resend.
best_reply: Sorry, I’m not sure if it was due to a network issue on our side, but we didn’t receive your messages properly. I can see that you may have sent three messages, but they didn’t come through on my end. Could you please resend them when you have a chance? Thank you so much, and sorry for the inconvenience!
chinese_translation: 不好意思，可能因为网络问题没有正常收到消息；看到好像发了三条，但这边没显示，请重新发送。
why_this_reply: 简短解释原因，不怪对方。
next_step: 等待对方重发。
risk_notes: 不要过度解释内部网络或账号问题。

creator_message: Before moving forward, I have questions: Net Revenue deductions, guaranteed flat project fee, exclusivity and licensing, deliverables, bio link, payment schedule, upfront payment.
business_context: Need answer all contract questions and recommend Revenue Share.
best_reply: Hi, thank you so much for your thoughtful questions. I’d be happy to clarify everything. Net Revenue refers to the revenue generated by the project after deducting reasonable and necessary costs directly related to its operation and distribution, such as payment processing fees, taxes, refunds if applicable, and other operational costs. To ensure transparency, you’ll have access to your own dashboard on our platform, where you can view project performance, subscription orders, and revenue data. Regarding the guaranteed Fixed Project Fee, it depends on our internal evaluation of your profile. However, after reviewing your account, I genuinely believe the Revenue Share model would be a much better fit. Under this model, creators receive 80% of the Net Revenue. The agreement grants us the right to distribute and promote the AI short drama for the agreed contract term, and the exclusivity clause applies only to the specific AI character and project created through our collaboration. It does not prevent you from working with other companies or participating in other AI-related projects in general. For deliverables, creators are typically asked to publish around five promotional posts related to the project. The timing of the bio link will be coordinated according to the project launch schedule. For the Fixed Project Fee model, payment is made in two installments: 50% within 10 business days after the agreement has been signed and the project officially enters production, and the remaining 50% after the project has been completed and officially released. We don’t provide an upfront payment before production begins.
chinese_translation: 逐条回答 Net Revenue、固定费、授权独家、交付、Bio链接和付款节奏；固定费无制作前预付款。
why_this_reply: 合同审阅阶段要一次性清晰回答，降低法务疑虑。
next_step: 发送对应合同草案供审核。
risk_notes: Bio link 不要承诺具体时长；不要承诺制作前预付款。

creator_message: ¿Cómo funciona la transparencia del modelo de Revenue Share? ¿Tendré acceso a un panel o será mediante estados de cuenta?
business_context: Explain dashboard + statements + two-month detailed report request.
best_reply: Sobre la transparencia del modelo de Revenue Share, después de iniciar el proyecto registraremos una cuenta para ti en nuestra plataforma. Desde el panel podrás consultar datos relacionados con el rendimiento del proyecto, órdenes de pago y la información de ingresos. Además, de acuerdo con el contrato, recibirás estados de cuenta según el calendario de pago establecido. Si tienes alguna duda sobre el cálculo de ingresos, dentro de los dos meses posteriores a recibir cada estado de cuenta podrás presentar una solicitud por escrito para obtener un reporte de ingresos más detallado. Queremos que el proceso sea lo más claro y transparente posible para ambas partes.
chinese_translation: 西语：项目开始后会注册平台账号，可看数据面板、订单和收益；按合同提供结算单，两个月内可书面申请详细报告。
why_this_reply: 回应分成透明度，同时引用合同机制。
next_step: 继续推进合同签署。
risk_notes: 不要承诺实时提现或第三方审计。

creator_message: Could you share average performance range or case studies for similar AI drama projects?
business_context: Share platform link and Persian Revenge case. Mention USD 500,000 gross paid revenue.
best_reply: Mientras lo evalúan, también les recomiendo echar un vistazo a algunos de los proyectos disponibles en nuestra plataforma. En particular, les sugiero buscar “La Venganza de Persia”. El creador de esa serie eligió nuestro modelo de Revenue Share, y el proyecto alcanzó unos ingresos brutos cercanos a los USD 500,000. Por supuesto, cada proyecto es diferente y los resultados pueden variar. Sin embargo, creemos que el éxito de una serie depende principalmente de dos factores: una historia atractiva y un creador con una comunidad sólida. Cuando un buen concepto se combina con una base de seguidores comprometida y una estrategia conjunta de promoción, el potencial de crecimiento y monetización suele ser muy interesante.
chinese_translation: 推荐看平台作品，特别是《波斯复仇记》，其创作者采用收益分成，总付费收入约50万美元；强调不保证每个项目一样。
why_this_reply: 用案例增强分成信心，同时加免责声明。
next_step: 发平台链接，问是否愿意看合同。
risk_notes: 必须说每个项目结果不同，不保证收益。

creator_message: Could you send me a few sample projects?
business_context: Explain samples are references only; every project is custom.
best_reply: Of course! I’ll send you a few sample projects. Please note that these are reference samples only. Every collaboration is created from scratch, and each AI short drama is customized around the creator’s personality, content style, and audience. Our production process usually works like this: we first discuss the creative direction with the creator, then our content team develops the story outline and script, the creator reviews the outline and script and can provide feedback before production, our AI production team creates the complete series, and finally the project is launched, with free episodes shared on social media and the full series released on our platform.
chinese_translation: 样片仅供参考，每个项目都会重新定制；简述创意沟通、大纲剧本、审核、制作、上线流程。
why_this_reply: 避免对方误以为样片就是最终效果或套模板。
next_step: 发送样片链接并继续讨论合作模式。
risk_notes: 不要承诺样片同等制作质量，除非确定。

creator_message: ストーリーはどのように進めますか？
business_context: Japanese creator asks story workflow.
best_reply: ご質問ありがとうございます！ストーリーの制作は、基本的に以下のような流れで進みます。まず、クリエイターのアイデアや希望をヒアリングします。世界観やジャンル、キャラクター設定、ストーリーの雰囲気など、「こんな作品にしたい」というイメージをぜひ共有してください。その内容をもとに、コンテンツチームがストーリーの大まかな構成（アウトライン）を作成します。アウトライン完成後、クリエイターにも確認していただきます。ご意見や修正したい点があれば、その段階で一緒に調整していきます。アウトラインが確定した後、脚本制作・AI制作へ進みます。つまり、一方的にストーリーを決めるのではなく、クリエイターと一緒に作品を作り上げていくプロセスになります。
chinese_translation: 日语：先听取创作者想法，内容团队出大纲，创作者确认反馈，再进入剧本和AI制作。
why_this_reply: 日语达人对创作参与度敏感，需要强调共同创作。
next_step: 邀请对方提前分享世界观/角色/题材。
risk_notes: 不要说内容团队已经有具体概念，除非已确认。

creator_message: Korean creator has signed.
business_context: Ask for content ideas today; content team will be coordinated.
best_reply: 안녕하세요! 😊 좋은 소식 감사합니다. 정말 기대됩니다! 혹시 스토리 방향, 캐릭터 설정, 전체적인 분위기나 콘텐츠 아이디어가 있으시다면 오늘 저에게 편하게 전달해 주세요. 제가 먼저 정리해서 콘텐츠팀에 공유드리겠습니다. 저도 오늘 콘텐츠팀과 함께 프로젝트 진행을 위한 그룹을 만들고, 본격적으로 창작 방향을 논의할 수 있도록 조율하겠습니다. 이번 프로젝트를 함께하게 되어 정말 기대됩니다. 좋은 작품을 함께 만들어보고 싶습니다! 🚀
chinese_translation: 韩语：感谢签约，如今天有故事方向/角色/氛围/创意可发来，我会整理给内容团队并拉群推进。
why_this_reply: 签约后应立刻推进内容阶段，保持热情。
next_step: 收集创意，拉内容团队群。
risk_notes: 不要承诺当天一定产出大纲。

creator_message: Creator says they used GPT and the idea became too detailed.
business_context: Reassure them that overall direction/worldview/character setting is enough.
best_reply: 괜찮습니다. 😊 저희는 전체적인 방향성과 세계관, 캐릭터 설정 정도만 이해하면 충분합니다. 이번에 보내주신 아이디어만으로도 작품의 큰 방향은 잘 이해할 수 있었어요. 정말 좋은 아이디어를 많이 공유해 주셔서 감사합니다! 이제 제가 내용을 정리해서 콘텐츠팀에 전달드리고, 그 방향을 바탕으로 함께 발전시켜 나가겠습니다. 😊
chinese_translation: 没关系，我们只需要理解大方向、世界观和人物设定；感谢分享，我会整理给内容团队。
why_this_reply: 避免让对方尴尬，也避免继续产出过细剧本。
next_step: 整理给内容团队。
risk_notes: 不要点破或评价其 GPT 内容质量。

creator_message: Creator signed agreement.
business_context: Tell them agreement received, will coordinate content team on business day, ask for initial story ideas.
best_reply: Hi! 😊 Thank you so much! We've received your signed agreement. We'll review and countersign it as soon as possible. Since it's currently the weekend, we'll coordinate with our content team at the beginning of the next business week so we can officially start the creative development process. In the meantime, if you already have any initial ideas about the story direction, character, setting, or the overall tone you'd like to explore, feel free to organize them and send them to me over the next couple of days. Before I meet with our content team, I'll make sure to share all of your ideas with them so they can take them into consideration from the very beginning. Once we've aligned on the initial creative direction, we'll create a group chat with you and our content team to officially begin discussing the story development and production process.
chinese_translation: 已收到签约合同，会尽快核对；工作日联系内容团队；如果有故事方向/人设/氛围想法，可以先整理发来，之后拉群沟通。
why_this_reply: 签约后要让达人知道下一步清晰，同时提前收集内容方向。
next_step: 核对合同，联系内容团队，拉群。
risk_notes: 不要承诺周末立刻启动内容团队。

creator_message: Is this official?
business_context: Clarify project is officially operated; recruiting first group of creators.
best_reply: Yes, absolutely. This project is officially operated by our team. We're currently in the process of recruiting our first group of creator partners, so we're personally reaching out to creators and carefully selecting collaborators ourselves rather than working through a third party. Because this is still an early-stage project, we're putting a lot of effort into building strong relationships with our first group of creators. We hope not only to establish long-term partnerships with them, but also to work together to help grow the project and attract more creators to join in the future. That's one of the reasons we're offering such a competitive Revenue Share model. We truly see this as the beginning of a long-term collaboration, not just a one-time campaign.
chinese_translation: 说明项目是官方团队直接运营，目前在招募第一批创作者伙伴，希望建立长期关系。
why_this_reply: 建立信任感，回应官方性和真实性。
next_step: 继续推进合作模式或合同。
risk_notes: 不要夸大平台背书；只说官方团队直接负责。

creator_message: Reach out to me on WhatsApp at +...
business_context: User wants to keep communication via email for now because WhatsApp has issues, but not say too directly.
best_reply: Hi! Great to hear from you, and it's really nice to know that you already have experience with AI video tools. I think that will make our collaboration even smoother. For the moment, would it be okay if we continue our communication via email? It's currently the easiest way for me to keep everything organized and make sure I can provide you with all the project details promptly. Since it seems we're off to a great start, I think we can already begin discussing the next step. I'd love to know which collaboration model you feel is more suitable for you: Fixed Project Fee or Revenue Share. To be honest, most of the creators we've recently signed have chosen the Revenue Share model, as it offers much greater long-term earning potential.
chinese_translation: 先通过邮件沟通更方便完整整理信息；询问更倾向固定费还是收益分成，并推荐分成。
why_this_reply: 隐晦避开 WhatsApp 问题，同时推进合作模式选择。
next_step: 对方选择合作模式后发合同。
risk_notes: 不要直接说 WhatsApp 账号有问题。

creator_message: Could you share a few available times for a brief call?
business_context: Calls are not supported, but explain in detail via WhatsApp/email.
best_reply: Hi, thank you so much for your interest. At the moment, we're unfortunately not able to arrange phone or video calls for this project. However, I'd be more than happy to continue the conversation via WhatsApp or email, where I can answer all of your questions in detail and provide any additional information you need. I can walk you through the entire collaboration process—from the creative development, production workflow, and deliverables to the payment models, timeline, and any other questions you may have. I'll make sure you have all the information you need before making any decision.
chinese_translation: 暂时无法电话/视频，但可通过 WhatsApp 或邮件详细说明创作、制作、交付、付款、周期等。
why_this_reply: 拒绝通话但补充详细解释，降低对方疑虑。
next_step: 让对方选择 WhatsApp 或 email 继续。
risk_notes: 不要说公司不支持通话太生硬。

creator_message: Creator has not replied after agreement was sent yesterday afternoon.
business_context: Gently follow up; project is actively moving; don't pressure too much.
best_reply: Hi! 😊 I hope you're doing well. I just wanted to follow up and see if you've had a chance to review the agreement. I was wondering if you have any questions or if there's anything you'd like me to clarify—I'd be more than happy to help. Our project is currently moving forward quite actively, and we're beginning to coordinate content development with our first group of creators. If we're able to confirm our collaboration soon, it will also allow us to reserve production resources and start developing your project earlier. Of course, there's absolutely no rush—I just wanted to check in and see if there was anything I could assist with. Looking forward to hearing from you! 😊
chinese_translation: 温和跟进是否看过合同，有问题可解答；项目在推进，若尽快确认可更早预留内容制作资源；不催太紧。
why_this_reply: 合同发出后适度推进，制造轻微时间感但不压迫。
next_step: 等待反馈或解答疑问。
risk_notes: 不要给对方压力过大。

creator_message: Creator said they would read detailed proposal but has not replied for two days.
business_context: Gently chase.
best_reply: Hi! 😊 I just wanted to follow up to see if you've had a chance to review the information I sent over a couple of days ago. I'd love to hear your thoughts whenever you have a moment. If you have any questions about either the Fixed Fee or Revenue Share model, or if there's anything you'd like me to clarify, I'm more than happy to help. Looking forward to hearing from you, and I hope we can move this exciting project forward together! 😊
chinese_translation: 跟进是否看过前几天的信息；有固定费或分成问题可解答；期待推进项目。
why_this_reply: 两天未回适合轻催，不提资源压力。
next_step: 等待回复。
risk_notes: 不要显得急。

creator_message: I’m interested in the revenue share model. Will you be creating content for YouTube Shorts or YouTube videos?
business_context: Explain main content is AI short drama on platform; free clips can be posted to YouTube Shorts.
best_reply: Hey! That’s great to hear — I think the Revenue Share model could be a strong fit. For this project, we’re mainly creating an AI short drama series for our platform. The free episodes and promotional clips can be published on social media, including YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels, or other platforms we agree on together. For longer YouTube videos, we can also discuss if it fits your content style, but the main format is usually short-form episodes and clips designed to drive viewers to unlock the full series on our platform.
chinese_translation: 主要制作平台 AI 短剧；免费剧集和宣传片段可发 YouTube Shorts、TikTok、Reels 等；长视频可根据账号风格再讨论。
why_this_reply: 回答平台和内容形式，同时保持灵活性。
next_step: 确认对方平台和分成兴趣。
risk_notes: 不要承诺一定做长 YouTube 视频。

creator_message: For the fixed-fee option, would I be required to post the AI drama on my own social media accounts or only on your platform?
business_context: Explain around five promo posts on social, full series on platform.
best_reply: Yes, under the Fixed Project Fee model, creators are typically asked to publish around five promotional posts related to the project on their own social media accounts during the launch period. These usually include the free episodes, trailers, highlight clips, behind-the-scenes content, or other mutually agreed promotional materials. They are all centered around the same AI short drama project rather than separate advertising campaigns. The complete AI short drama will be released on our platform, while the content published on your social media is designed to introduce the story and guide interested viewers to unlock the full series on our platform.
chinese_translation: 固费模式下通常需要在社媒发布约5条项目相关内容，完整短剧在平台上线，社媒内容用于引导观看解锁。
why_this_reply: 清晰解释创作者社媒和平台之间的分工。
next_step: 继续说明付款或发送样片。
risk_notes: 不要把5条说成五个独立广告。

creator_message: What happens after the two-year revenue share period ends? If the drama continues generating revenue, would revenue sharing continue or would a new agreement be reached?
business_context: User wants simple answer: if revenue continues, discuss near end of term whether to sign new agreement or supplemental agreement; platform retains distribution rights. Avoid mentioning 10-year details.
best_reply: If the project continues to generate revenue near the end of the two-year contract term, we would discuss the next steps with you before the term expires, including whether to enter into a new cooperation agreement or sign a supplemental agreement. The platform will retain the distribution rights for the project, and we would communicate with you in advance regarding any future cooperation arrangement.
chinese_translation: 两年期快到时如仍产生收益，会讨论是否签新协议或补充协议；平台保留发行权。
why_this_reply: 直接回答合同期后问题，不展开复杂权利条款。
next_step: 继续合同审核。
risk_notes: 不要提合同期后持续十年运营分发权细节。

creator_message: But you can use my image.
business_context: Clarify image use limited to this project, not other commercial use or AI training.
best_reply: Just to clarify, our use of your image and likeness would be limited only to this specific AI short drama project and its related promotion and distribution. We would not use your image for any unrelated projects, other commercial purposes, or AI model training. The authorization is only for this particular series and the promotional materials connected to it.
chinese_translation: 肖像使用仅限本部 AI 短剧及相关宣传发行，不用于其他项目、商业用途或 AI 训练。
why_this_reply: 解决肖像授权范围担忧。
next_step: 继续合同或报价讨论。
risk_notes: 不要扩大授权解释。

creator_message: My audience is mainly Spanish-speaking. What is the strategy to promote the series among Spanish-speaking audiences?
business_context: Mention recently signed two Spanish-language creators, projects in production, market is important.
best_reply: Sobre el mercado hispanohablante, también es una dirección que estamos valorando mucho actualmente. De hecho, recientemente hemos firmado con dos creadores cuyo público principal es de habla hispana, y sus proyectos ya están avanzando en la etapa de desarrollo de contenido. Por eso creemos que este mercado tiene un gran potencial para nuestro modelo de AI Short Drama. Además de tus propias publicaciones, nosotros también apoyaremos la distribución y promoción global del proyecto desde nuestra plataforma, por lo que el crecimiento de la serie será un esfuerzo conjunto.
chinese_translation: 西语市场是重点，近期已签约两个西语受众为主的创作者，项目在内容制作中；平台也会全球推广，不只靠创作者。
why_this_reply: 回应市场适配和平台推广疑虑。
next_step: 询问 WhatsApp 或推进合同。
risk_notes: 不要承诺具体广告投放预算。
